description: This is a clean, decrypted static JSON API database for DUDE TV, generated automatically every 6 hours via GitHub Actions.

categories_menu.description: Main category menu list. Contains the category names, images, and links.

fields.title: Category display name
fields.catLink: The path to the subcategory channels list (e.g. 'cats/bangla.json') OR a direct M3U playlist URL (starts with http/https)

categories_menu.usage_flow: Step 1: Fetch this file to render the menu. When user clicks a category: if 'catLink' starts with 'http', stream the M3U. If it points to a local file, fetch it from 'base_url + /cats/{catLink}'.

sports_tv_channels.description: List of standard sports TV channels.

fields.title: Channel display name
fields.formats: Array of stream server format names

sports_tv_channels.usage_flow: To play a TV channel: Fetch its stream links using '/channels/{id}.json' (e.g., '/channels/1.json').

live_events.description: List of live and upcoming sports matches and events.

fields.title: Event title
fields.eventInfo: Object containing teams, logos, event name, start and end times

live_events.usage_flow: To play a live match/event: Fetch its stream links using '/channels/{id}.json' (e.g., '/channels/50002.json').

live_events_combined.description: A consolidated central database combining all live events directly with their decrypted channel links. Recommended for web and single-page apps to avoid multiple fetch requests.

fields.title: Event title
fields.decoded_channels: Array of stream objects containing 'api', 'link', 'logo', and 'title'

highlights.description: List of completed matches highlights and replays.

fields.title: Match title
fields.formats: Available highlight categories (e.g., HIGHLIGHTS, FULL MATCH)

highlights.usage_flow: To play highlights: Fetch its stream links using '/channels/{id}.json' (e.g., '/channels/100035.json').

event_categories.description: Filter categories for live events (e.g. Football, Cricket, Badminton).

subcategory_details.description: Contains list of channels inside a specific category (e.g. `/cats/bangla.json`).

fields.id: Channel identifier (use this to fetch stream links from /channels/{id}.json)
fields.title: Channel display name

decrypted_stream_links.description: Contains decrypted playback streams for any specific live event, highlight, or TV channel.

fields.title: Stream title/quality/server name (e.g. beIN Sports HD)
fields.link: The playback stream URL (DASH/MPD or HLS/M3U8). Note: Some URLs contain headers like '|user-agent=...' or '|Cookie=...' which MUST be parsed and set as custom request headers in your player.
fields.api: ClearKey decryption keys in the format 'kid:key' for encrypted DASH streams (if applicable).

decrypted_stream_links.player_decryption_handling: If 'api' is present (e.g. '385ceb97...:18dce92...'), it represents a DRM protected stream. Split the 'api' string by ':' to get the Key ID (left) and Key (right), and pass them to your player's DRM ClearKey configuration.
